ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, OR(ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Status__c), ISNEW()), ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c,'No PoC Required') , ISPICKVAL( Reason_for_No_PoC_Required_Dropdown__c,'') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select a Reason for No PoC Required as Processing Status is No PoC Required
